description: CompositionCream kurta made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, slit neck with purple and cream printed detailing and has printed detailing along the hem FittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this cream kurta from w!
